Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

# Load berry data
with open\('C:/Users/danie/Xanic Dashboard/data/berry_data.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    berry = json.load\(f\)

print\("=== BERRY DATA - All California Entries ===\\n"\)
calif_berry = [d for d in berry if d.get\('appellation', ''\).lower\(\) == 'california']
for entry in calif_berry:
    print\(f"sampleId: '{entry.get\('sampleId'\)}' \(lotCode: '{entry.get\('lotCode'\)}'\)"\)
    print\(f"  Variety: {entry.get\('variety'\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Date: {entry.get\('sampleDate'\)}, Vintage: {entry.get\('vintage'\)}"\)
    print\(f"  tANT: {entry.get\('tANT'\)}, Brix: {entry.get\('brix'\)}, pH: {entry.get\('pH'\)}"\)
    print\(\)
EOF)
